title: Timeline widget Drag and Drop
excerpt:
Ability to drag and drop items VERTICALLY in timeline view. 
Example, if grouped by ‘Group’ then allow an item to be dragged from one group to the other, not just left to righ along the timeline

posts.author: Jason.B (Jason Babic)
posts.cookedHtml:
Ability to drag and drop items VERTICALLY in timeline view.

Example, if grouped by ‘Group’ then allow an item to be dragged from one group to the other, not just left to righ along the timeline
